news.t: KBW Announces Index Rebalancing for Fourth-Quarter 2025

holdings.infoBox: KBWD is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are FS KKR Capital stock at 4.19%, Orchid Island Capital at 4.11%, Invesco Mortgage Capital at 3.93%, New Mountain Finance at 3.91%, and Trinity Capital at 3.74%.

overview.description: The Invesco KBW High Dividend Yield Financial ETF (KBWD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks a dividend-yield-weighted index of US financial firms. KBWD was launched on Dec 2, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: KBW Nasdaq Financial Sector Dividend Yield Index

data.title: The main driver for loan growth is economic growth, says KBW CEO
data.text: Tom Michaud, KBW CEO, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the financial sector and whether or not regional banks or national banks best stand for growth and why.

data.title: 10 High-Yield ETFs for Income-Minded Investors
data.text: These high-yield ETFs show that there's no shortage of ways to balance risk and reward in the quest for better-than-average income.
